name: Deeprock Minerals Inc.
summary: Deeprock Minerals Inc. engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in Canada. It has an option agreement to acquire 50% interests in the Ralleau property located in the Quevillon area of Quebec; to acquire 100% interests in the Romanium property covering an area of 7.641 square kilometre located in the Apuseni mountains of western Romania's Bihor county; and to acquire 100% interests in 13 mineral claims in the Golden Gate project located in the Gloucester Count, Bathurst mining division, New Brunswick. The company was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
